description: CRITICAL: ALWAYS call this tool - NEVER make up, guess, or fabricate data. Find contact with multiple phone numbers. Use this tool directly only when a single call to this tool is sufficient to complete the user's request; for any sequence of two or more tool calls, use the `batch_action` tool instead.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

oneOf.description: Comma-separated list of phone numbers (legacy format, still supported).
Preferred v1.1 format: array of phone numbers.

phoneNumbers.description: Phone numbers for bulk existence lookup.
